text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On my way home, I notice there's a light on in the
dance studio. I go to turn it off when I realize
someone's inside.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: P-peace, peeeace!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Urk... Wh-why must I do this pose?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
And why would a fan request such a pose in the
first place?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
It's not part of the show's choreography, and by
all rights, this is Gold Ship's pose, not mine...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Is she training for a concert? I should warn her it's
almost curfew, but she seems laser-focused.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
N-no... I must meet their expectations, no matter
what they may be.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Winning concerts are an opportunity for me to
express my gratitude to the fans who support me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I have to forget this timidity, and delight the
audience with all my effort. That's what I vowed
to do, after all!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
All right, since that is now settled, it's time to
move on to the next part! This one will be difficult
as well, but...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: L-lovey dovey... kiss!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Aaaagh...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I-I can't take it! This is too bizarre! It's not in my
nature at all...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Thank goodness no one else is here. If anyone saw me, I would be the laughingstock of—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
T... Trainer? H-how long have you been standing
there?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
T... Trainer? H-how long have you been standing
there?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Really? Do you really, honestly, truly mean it?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Do you swear on the cafeteria's exclusive
tiramisu?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Whoa... Then I can believe you. A vow on that
tiramisu is an earnest one, indeed.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Now then, I must continue working on this fan
servi—on this dance.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I will be sure to leave before curfew, so you may
go home without worrying about me.
choice_data_list: How about I keep you company?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Huh?! That would be terrib—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
U-um, I mean, I'll be fine. Please go home and
have a nice rest.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Okay? T-take care!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She vigorously pushes me toward the door,
forcing me to leave.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: My! Really?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I'm glad to hear that. I'm having trouble getting
used to it. The whole thing makes me feel
awkward.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Wait a minute. That means you... you were...
watching just now?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Nooooo! Th-th-this can't be!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Y-you're telling me you liked the... lovey...
dovey... k-k-k-k-kiss?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Whatever the case! If you tell anyone this, I will
never speak to you again! Ever!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
You can be absolutely, positively sure that I'm
serious! And one more thing!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: ...Which part?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I mean... Um...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Wh-which part... was "really good"?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I give Mejiro McQueen my thoughts and then
keep her company until curfew.
